name: Ofx.thkcello
title: Ocean Model Cell Thickness
description: Thickness of ocean cells. "Thickness" means the vertical extent of a layer. "Cell" refers to a model grid-cell.
processing note: If this field is time-dependent then save it instead as one of your Omon fields (see the Omon table) CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean CMIP7:area: mean where sea,
